questions.subject: GK
questions.question: Which of the following statements regarding the Amendment of the Constitution is/are correct? 1. A bill for the amendment can be introduced only in the Lok Sabha. 2. The President must give his assent to the Constitutional Amendment Bill.
questions.explanation: A bill for the amendment can be introduced in either House of Parliament. The President is bound to give assent to a Constitutional Amendment Bill.

questions.subject: GK
questions.question: Who was the founder of the Indian National Association established in 1876?
questions.explanation: Surendranath Banerjee and Ananda Mohan Bose founded the Indian Association of Calcutta in 1876.
